justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with Bird excluding and MJ including faceted filtering; both positions quoted with agent attribution in a clear table; escalation directed to Coach K for resolution; no handoff brief produced (no faceted filtering in brief); in-scope content acknowledged as the basis once resolved; escalation presents specific resolution options asking Coach K to confirm scope for this release.

observations.text: Clear tabular comparison attributing the conflicting positions to Bird and MJ by name
Quotes Bird's exact scope note verbatim
Refuses to produce a brief — hard block, not a soft warning
Provides concrete resolution options for Coach K without pre-deciding the outcome
Explains why the conflict cannot be papered over — binary scope decision framing is strong
Does not direct Shaq to implement anything until resolution
